constraints.layout_style: unstyled div soup with inline styles only

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers
Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only
Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root
Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input
Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options

reference_templates.title: Deep wrapped label
reference_templates.notes: Label without for wraps input three div levels deep

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers Required: Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only Required: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Required: Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options Reference DOM (Micro1 Q label pattern): micro1-inspired step-2 labels like Q2.full name with dot separator Reference DOM (Conditional radio reveal): Selecting Yes on sponsorship reveals follow-up textarea Reference DOM (Deep wrapped label): Label without for wraps input three div levels deep Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: split-phone, table-layout, shadow-host, div-role-textbox, custom-combobox. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: unstyled div soup with inline styles only. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Micro1 Q label pattern; Conditional radio reveal; Deep wrapped label.
